message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Re-review: blocking items fixed, CI green">
Luca has addressed all blocking review items and CI is green. Reviewers who had blocking items — please re-review to verify your concerns are resolved:

- Steve Krug, Lea Verou, Steve Schoger: context headings/grouping
- Carson Gross: filter partial swap
- Heydon Pickering: focus management + visible label on context select
- Marty Cagan: your 2 blocking items

If satisfied, please send your consensus approval to luca-palmieri. Kent Beck and Scott Wlaschin already approved.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already approved in my initial review -- I had no blocking issues. Let me confirm my consensus.

input.content:
Confirming my consensus approval stands. I had no blocking issues in my initial review -- the domain model, type design, glossary, and error types were all solid. No re-review needed from my side.

9/9 consensus: **approved** (domain architecture).

routing.content:

content.text: My consensus approval is confirmed. I had no blocking items so no re-review was necessary. The domain architecture is sound -- the NextAction enum state machine, mandatory ContextId, pure domain core, and glossary updates all meet our standards.
